allow: Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'rl_advanced'\); from config import Config; from env import MultiAGVEnv; cfg = Config\(\); cfg.n_agvs=2; cfg.n_dynamic_obs=1; cfg.episodes=5; env = MultiAGVEnv\(cfg\); s = env.reset\(\); print\(f'state_dim={s.shape[1]}'\); a = [1,0]; ns, r, d, info = env.step\(a\); print\(f'rewards={r}, done={d}, info={info}'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'rl_advanced'\); from config import Config; from network import DuelingDQN, NoisyLinear, PrioritizedReplayBuffer; import torch; cfg = Config\(\); net = DuelingDQN\(20, 5, 128, True\); x = torch.randn\(4, 20\); y = net\(x\); print\(f'output shape={y.shape}'\); buf = PrioritizedReplayBuffer\(1000\); buf.push\([1]*20, 0, 1.0, [2]*20, 0.0\); result = buf.sample\(2\); print\(f'PER sample ok: {result is not None}'\)")

Bash(python -u -c "import sys; sys.path.insert\(0, 'rl_advanced'\); from config import Config; from env import MultiAGVEnv; cfg = Config\(\); cfg.curriculum = True; cfg.curriculum_stages = [{'episodes':150,'n_agvs':2,'n_dynamic_obs':0,'enable_priority':False},{'episodes':150,'n_agvs':3,'n_dynamic_obs':1,'enable_priority':False},{'episodes':100,'n_agvs':4,'n_dynamic_obs':2,'enable_priority':True}]; dim = MultiAGVEnv.get_max_obs_dim\(cfg\); print\(f'max dim={dim}'\); cfg.n_agvs=2; cfg.n_dynamic_obs=0; cfg.enable_priority=False; env=MultiAGVEnv\(cfg\); s=env.reset\(\); print\(f'actual state shape={s.shape}'\)")
